'''Bin Prime''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]], after the capital was moved from the city of [[Sobrik]]. It was attacked during [[Operation Shadow Hand]], a couple years after the fall of the [[Galactic Empire]].

==History==
[[File:Battle_of_Balmorra.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Imperial troops advance on Bin Prime.]]
Sometime between [[3943 BBY]] and [[3941 BBY]],<ref name="SobriktoBinPrime">{{TOR_dates|2}} {{TORcite|type=codex|Sobrik}} states that Bin Prime became the capital of [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]] 300 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the events of the game. If a player chooses the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]], it causes the player to visit Balmorra in Act I, while choosing the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] causes the player to visit Balmorra in Act II. Thus, Bin Prime became the capital of Balmorra sometime between [[3943 BBY]] and [[3941 BBY]].</ref> the capital of Balmorra was moved from [[Sobrik]] to Bin Prime.<ref name="Sobrik Codex Entry">{{TORcite|type=codex|Sobrik}}</ref>

In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] travelled to Bin Prime to capture [[Groodo]] the Hutt. Groodo had been hiding at the well-defended castle of his brother [[Rigorra]], the planetary warlord. On Balmorra, Fett ran into [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]], who had been hunting Rigorra herself for personal reasons. The two hunters successfully infiltrated Rigorra's palace together but were captured along with two other bounty hunters—[[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] and [[Skorr/Legends|Skorr]]—who were also hunting Groodo. Fett and Sing managed to escape from Rigorra's clutches and capture their targets. Fett then delivered Rodd and Groodo to Count Dooku on [[Geonosis]], and departed.<ref name="SWA6">''[[Star Wars Adventures 6: The Warlords of Balmorra]]''</ref>

Bin Prime was the headquarters of planetary [[Governor/Legends|governor]] [[Hinch Beltane|Beltane]] during his administration under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation of the planet. Despite their income from producing Imperial war machines, Beltane wanted Balmorra free from the Empire. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the world broke away from Imperial influence. During [[Operation Shadow Hand]], it was [[Battle of Balmorra|attacked]] by [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]], who sent an invasion army towards the capital. Bin Prime was saved by the numerous technological achievements Balmorra had made in the intervening years, as new [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] models held the force at bay, before they could reach the fortified city's borders.<ref name="DEII 1">[[Dark Empire II 1|''Dark Empire II'' 1]]</ref>
